articles.title: Chrome’s AI features may be hogging 4GB of your computer storage - The Verge
articles.description: Chrome users are discovering that Google is installing a 4GB weights.bin file inside their browser directory when certain AI browser features are enabled.

articles.title: Stable One UI 8.5 update is rolling out to the Galaxy S25 series - SamMobile
articles.description: Samsung has released the stable version of One UI 8.5 (Android 16) for the Galaxy S25, Galaxy S25+, and Galaxy S25 Ultra. At the moment, the company is rolling out the update in South Korea. The update carries the build number CZDP. A wider rollout in other c…

articles.title: Palo Alto PAN-OS Flaw Under Active Exploitation Enables Remote Code Execution - The Hacker News
articles.description: CVE-2026-0300 exploited via public PAN-OS portal before May 13, 2026 patch, enabling root RCE on firewalls.

articles.description: It's time to update your Pixel

articles.title: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests - The Verge
articles.description: Google is upgrading Gemini for Home to Gemini 3.1, allowing users to give the smart home assistant more complex, multi-step requests.
